subcodes.first_line: The Ever-Living One beareth witness unto this Wronged One that there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. He hath opened the gate of heaven and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد القیوم لهذا المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم قد فتح باب السماء و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @belief and denial, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station of the Manifestation of God
